What We Offer

Our Services

From a quick exterior shine to a full interior detail — we bring the car wash to you.

Schedule Now
01

Basic Exterior Wash

Full exterior hand wash, wheel cleaning, tire shine, and streak-free window wipe-down. Perfect for weekly maintenance.

$59.99 / vehicle
02

Interior Cleaning

Deep vacuum, wipe-down of all surfaces, door panels, dashboard, console, and cup holders. Fresh and clean inside.

$79.99 / vehicle
03

Full Detail Package

Complete interior and exterior treatment. Hand wash, clay bar, interior deep clean, wax, and tire dressing. The full Caesar experience.

$129.99 / vehicle

Why Choose Us

The Caesar Standard

We're not just another car wash. We're a mobile service built around your schedule and your standards.

  • 01 We come to your home, office, or anywhere in Allen, TX — no driving required
  • 02 Easy online booking with instant confirmation through Setmore
  • 03 Transparent pricing with no hidden fees — pay with card via Stripe

  • 06 Every job done with attention to detail and pride in our work
